title: Security guard for railway work
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: Security guard qualification (T-man certificate), valid occupational safety and track safety card are also mandatory
Fluent knowledge of the Finnish language
You are reliable and have a good attitude towards work
Your benefits can be counted (but not necessary!) if you also have:
Travel readiness. The state railway network covers the whole of Finland.
B driver's license and car available.
Here are a few more reasons why you should choose the Additional service:

1 With us, as a job seeker and worker, you get truly personal service. You meet us face to face already during the job search phase. When you are employed through us, you will receive a designated contact person from us who will help you in all matters related to the employment relationship.
2 Our customer base in the construction industry is really diverse. That's why we are able to offer a wide range of different tasks, with something for everyone.
3 Thanks to our large customer base, jobs are constantly available, and when one job ends, you can soon be employed at the next job site, depending on your skills.
jobcontent:
ADDITIONAL SERVICE - THE RIGHT PEOPLE FOR THE RIGHT JOBS

 

We are now looking for a security guard for railway work in the SME region. Your days will be spent in track maintenance and construction tasks as part of a team of professionals. Work is available until the end of the season.

What do we expect from you?

 Security guard qualification (T-man certificate), valid occupational safety and track safety card are also mandatory

 Fluent knowledge of the Finnish language

 You are reliable and have a good attitude towards work

 

Your benefits can be counted (but not necessary!) if you also have:

 Travel readiness. The state railway network covers the whole of Finland.

 B driver's license and car available.

 

Here are a few more reasons why you should choose the Additional service:

1 With us, as a job seeker and worker, you get truly personal service. You meet us face to face already during the job search phase. When you are employed through us, you will receive a designated contact person from us who will help you in all matters related to the employment relationship.

2 Our customer base in the construction industry is really diverse. That's why we are able to offer a wide range of different tasks, with something for everyone.

3 Thanks to our large customer base, jobs are constantly available, and when one job ends, you can soon be employed at the next job site, depending on your skills.

4 We stick to agreed matters and do what we promise. You can focus on your work, because we take care of the extra bureaucracy for you.

 

Does that sound good? Great, we want to hear from you soon!

If we made you interested and you would like to join the Additional service team, send us an application as soon as possible! Put my experience and qualifications in your application.

Põhpalvelu is a domestic company that was founded in 2002 and offers flexible personnel solutions. The additional service group is known for its reliability and long-term customer relationships among both employers and employees. We employ more than 3,000 employees every year, and we are a strong player in many fields: we offer jobs, e.g. in the restaurant, construction, industrial, maintenance, logistics, office, cleaning and trade sectors. We are among the ten largest personnel service companies in Finland, and we are a member of the Human Resources Association Hela ry. 

We want to make going to work easy for you: through us, you can find employment the very next day. We constantly offer jobs for different life situations, and the temporary work done through us has been a route to permanent employment for many of our employees.

title: Early childhood education teacher / Länsimetsä daycare center
what_we_offer: The salary for this position is €2823/month.
The salary is determined according to the OVTES standard salary system.
The trial period is six months.
Before starting work, the person selected for the position must present a doctor's statement about his health (T-certificate) and a criminal record extract in accordance with Act 504/2002.

The Infectious Diseases Act (Section 55) obliges those working with children under school age to investigate the risk of tuberculosis infection. The questionnaire and interpretation instructions prepared by the Institute of Occupational Health are used as the tuberculosis questionnaire.
Those invited to the interview will bring their original degree and employment certificates with them.
jobcontent:
We are looking for an early childhood education teacher for Länsimetsä daycare center.

Länsimetsä daycare operates five groups of children and is located in Gerbyy, Vaasa, in a quiet area. We have good hiking and exercise opportunities, nature and the forest are right next to the kindergarten. The nursery also has a fenced yard area, e.g. for sports games.

The early childhood education teacher is responsible for the group's high-quality pedagogy, planning and evaluation, as well as cooperation with parents.

The eligibility requirement is eligibility for the position of early childhood education teacher in accordance with § 26 (transition provision § 75) of the Early Childhood Education Act (540 / 2018). 
A pre-teaching qualification is considered an advantage.

We read to our advantage
- strong pedagogical approach
- activity and initiative
- good interaction skills to support the well-being of the work community, children and families
- flexibility to act in changing everyday situations

Good cooperation and interaction skills are emphasized as the selection criteria.

We offer a job where you can use your own strengths to everyone's delight, enthusiastic and fun customers and a nice and humorous work community. Can that phrase also be used in this announcement?

In addition, we offer benefits for city services, an employee bicycle benefit, and the e-pass culture, exercise and well-being benefit. 

The salary for this position is €2823/month. 
The salary is determined according to the OVTES standard salary system.

The trial period is six months.

Before starting work, the person selected for the position must present a doctor's statement about his health (T-certificate) and a criminal record extract in accordance with Act 504/2002.

The Infectious Diseases Act (Section 55) obliges those working with children under school age to investigate the risk of tuberculosis infection. The questionnaire and interpretation instructions prepared by the Institute of Occupational Health are used as the tuberculosis questionnaire. 

Those invited to the interview will bring their original degree and employment certificates with them.

Our education professionals walk alongside the children and young people of Vaasa from the gate of the kindergarten until the last spring party on the school road. Thanks to our experts, Vaasa offers a wide range of high-quality cultural and library services, the joy of exercise and insights at colleges for young people and adults alike.

Kindergarten director Päivi Ahlsved, tel. 040 575 0372

Those invited to the interview will bring their original degree and employment certificates with them.

Our education professionals walk alongside the children and young people of Vaasa from the gate of the kindergarten until the last spring party on the school road. title: Caregivers for home care in Tammisaari for full-time work
jobapply_link: mailto:info@samscare.fi?subject=Application for the Job - Lähihoitajia kotihoitoon Tammisaareen kokopäivätyöhön
what_we_expect: to work in a multicultural environment in healthcare
to assess the elderly's ability to take care of themselves
ensure the safety of healthcare customers
what_we_offer: Versatile work. The position includes office and customer work.
Flexible working hours and the possibility to influence work shifts
jobcontent:
Due to our growing number of customers, we are looking for more care professionals to join our team.

The daily tasks include, among other things, assisting customers in their daily activities, basic care, performing procedures, medical treatment and office work. The possibility to work only on weekdays.

The work would start as soon as possible.

For the task you must have:

Nursing degree

Good oral and written Finnish language skills. Studies in Finnish or Swedish, or B2 level language certificate The position requires a LOP/LOVe medical license

B driver's license

What we offer:

Versatile work. The position includes office and customer work.

Competitive salary

Flexible working hours and the possibility to influence work shifts

Varied trainings and good orientation

Applications by email to info@samscare.fi
translated_content:
Caregivers for home care in Tammisaari for full-time work

Due to our growing number of customers, we are looking for more care professionals to join our team.

The daily tasks include, among other things, assisting customers in their daily activities, basic care, performing procedures, medical treatment and office work. The possibility to work only on weekdays.

The work would start as soon as possible.

For the task you must have:

Nursing degree

Good oral and written Finnish language skills. Studies in Finnish or Swedish, or B2 level language certificate The position requires a LOP/LOVe medical license

B driver's license

What we offer:

Versatile work. The position includes office and customer work.

Competitive salary

Flexible working hours and the possibility to influence work shifts

Varied trainings and good orientation

Applications by email to info@samscare.fi

title: Warehouse worker (language skills Ukraine)
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
We are looking for a Ukrainian-speaking warehouse worker for our customer company in a cold storage. 

For the selected person, we will conduct an entry-to-work inspection at the occupational health service.

Work starts immediately. 
The duration of the work is until the end of August.

We interview applicants already during the application process and the position will be filled immediately
after the person is found.

If you are the person we are looking for, please submit an application, thank you. 
 
 
Rentaman provides skilled labor for the customer's needs.
translated_content:

For the selected person, we will conduct an entry-to-work inspection at the occupational health service.

Work starts immediately.

after the person is found.

If you are the person we are looking for, please submit an application, thank you.
